expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材大小。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 为总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผงหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang Pagsusukat, [BoardThick] ay ang materyal na kapal ng Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid ng board; [BackBoardThick] ay ang materyal na kapal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ပျဉ်ပြားများ၏အရွယ်အစားကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်သည်၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်၊ အောက်နှင့် ဘေး ဘုတ်များ၏ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်၏ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដង់ស៊ីតេខ្សែសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាការវាស់ចំលងសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សាច់ក្រណាត់ទូខាងលើ, ខាងក្រោម និងខាង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់ស្រីសាច់ក្រណាត់ខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຄືມາດຕາງທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຊອນຂອງທີ່ຍອນ, ທິ່ຜູໃຕ້ ແລະທີ່ຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາວຊອນກັບຂະໜາດຄວາມສົມໄຊ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth] は総合寸法、[BoardThick] は上板、下板、側板の材質の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] はバックボードの材質の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛용 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드의 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 백보드의 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medición total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les tailles des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches du haut, du bas et des côtés, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
